creator: if@xip.at
text:

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: ifconfig em0 10.11.11.175/24
ifconfig em0 alias 10.20.20.1/24
route add -net 10.20.20.0/24 10.11.11.1 -weight 2
